cargo fmt --check
cargo clippy -p puml --all-targets --all-features --locked -- -D warnings
cargo nextest run -p puml --locked
cargo test --doc --package puml --locked
cargo llvm-cov --all-features --package puml --fail-under-lines 87 --ignore-filename-regex 'src/(main|bin/puml-lsp|lib|parser|preproc|normalize|render|specialized)\.rs|src/(frontend|normalize|parser|render|specialized)/.*\.rs' --no-clean
cargo build --release -p puml --locked --bin puml
./scripts/bench.sh --skip-build --enforce-gates
